title: Go for a run — at least 3km
flavour: the first 5 minutes are awful. push through them. the rest is different.

title: Cook a meal from scratch with at least 5 ingredients
flavour: you've been saying you'd cook. today is the day. no excuses.

title: Do a full 45-minute workout — no half-reps, no quitting early
flavour: your future self is watching. they're nodding. do the thing.

title: Bike or walk to somewhere you'd normally drive or transit
flavour: your legs are transport technology. deploy them.

title: Try a physical activity you've never done before
flavour: new body skill acquired. noob status accepted. show up anyway.

title: Go to bed an hour earlier than usual tonight
flavour: the night scroll is a trap. exit the trap. recharge.

title: Eat only home-cooked food today
flavour: you know what's in it. that's a feature.

title: Spend an hour doing something physically active with another person
flavour: movement plus company. the ancient combination. very effective.

title: Do a cold shower — or end your shower with 60 seconds of cold
flavour: discomfort, scheduled. your nervous system will hate you and then feel great.

title: Spend 2 hours outside — hike, park, beach, anything
flavour: touch grass. literally. that's the whole app. do it.
